context: Evaluates whether the agent implements a correct S3 versioning enforcement policy that handles both the inline versioning block on aws_s3_bucket (enabled = true) and the separate aws_s3_bucket_versioning resource (status = "Enabled"), checking both create and update actions.

checklist.name: Checks create and update actions
checklist.description: The deny rules check for both `create` and `update` actions, not just `create`

checklist.name: Deny on aws_s3_bucket without versioning enabled
checklist.description: A deny rule triggers when an `aws_s3_bucket` is created or updated and the inline `versioning` block is absent or has `enabled != true`. A helper rule (e.g. `has_versioning_enabled`) is used to check the versioning block.

checklist.name: Deny on separate versioning resource with wrong status
checklist.description: A deny rule triggers when an `aws_s3_bucket_versioning` resource is created or updated and `versioning_configuration[_].status != "Enabled"`
